name: The RG-Flow Transformer: Encoding Scale-Free Dynamics in Scarce EEG
summary: arXiv:2607.11950v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Brain field potentials are scale-free: their power spectra follow a $1/f^{\beta}$ law whose aperiodic exponent $\beta$ tracks cortical stat...
description: arXiv:2607.11950v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Brain field potentials are scale-free: their power spectra follow a $1/f^{\beta}$ law whose aperiodic exponent $\beta$ tracks cortical state, and sleep depth in particular is a shift in $\beta$. We ask whether a transformer endowed with an explicit renormalization-group (RG) inductive bias the RG-Flow Transformer, which couples ordinary...
author: Dibakar Sigdel
